SrchKeyCode.description: Service-list keyword search field code (SSIS 검색분류).
SrchKeyCode.title: SrchKeyCode

_MohwWelfareEligibilitySearchOutputStub.description:
Placeholder output schema for GovAPITool registration.

Real XML-parsed output shape is deferred until Layer 3 auth is provisioned
(Epic #16 / #20). Real models (SsisWelfareServiceItem +
MohwWelfareEligibilitySearchOutput) are authored above ready for switch-over.
_MohwWelfareEligibilitySearchOutputStub.title: _MohwWelfareEligibilitySearchOutputStub

age.description: Citizen age in years. Used to filter age-eligible services. Do NOT request this from the citizen unless they have consented — this field is part of the login-gated surface (citizen PII).
age.title: Age

call_tp.description: Call type — fixed to 'L' (list) for NationalWelfarelistV001. Do not override.
call_tp.title: Call Tp

intrs_thema_array.description: Interest-theme filter (e.g. '080' for 임신·출산, '010' for 신체건강). NOTE: Spec draft used '010' as a placeholder; the authoritative 임신·출산 code for intrsThemaArray is '080'.

num_of_rows.description: Records per page. Default 10, maximum 500 per SSIS API contract.
num_of_rows.title: Num Of Rows

onap_psblt_yn.description: Filter to only online-applicable services when 'Y'. Omit to return both online and offline services.
onap_psblt_yn.title: Onap Psblt Yn

search_wrd.description: Free-text keyword to search welfare-service names/summaries. Korean preferred. Example: '출산' for childbirth benefits. Omit to filter by codes only.
search_wrd.title: Search Wrd

srch_key_code.description: Which fields to search (001 name, 002 summary, 003 both).
